# Confluence Documentation Overview

## Entry Page (18940713)
TTT main wiki page. Team: PO (Aleksandr Maksimenko), Analyst (Irina Malakhovskaia), 1 FE, 2 BE, 2 QA.

**18 child pages** including: AI Tools Usage, Automation test plans, cron, Frontend Instructions, Incidents, Integration test, BDD testing, Roadmap, Sprint 15 pre-release, Trackers integration, TTT CustDev, Release notes, TTT Requirements, Retrospectives, WebSocket events, Vacations-Calendar interaction, CompanyStaff integration.

## Requirements Hub (119244529)
5 requirement areas:
1. **Accounting / Бухгалтерия** (130387462) — not yet fetched

5. **Vacations / Отпуск** (130385085) — parent for sub-pages
